bulbasaur.name: Bulbasaur
bulbasaur.description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this Pokemon.

ivysaur.name: Ivysaur
ivysaur.description: When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

venusaur.name: Venusaur
venusaur.description: The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

charmander.name: Charmander
charmander.description: The flame at the tip of its tail makes a sound as it burns. You can only hear it in quiet places.

charmeleon.name: Charmeleon
charmeleon.description: When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels.

charizard.name: Charizard
charizard.description: It spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. It may cause forest fires by blowing flames.

squirtle.name: Squirtle
squirtle.description: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

wartortle.name: Wartortle
wartortle.description: It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that Wartortle is very old.

blastoise.name: Blastoise
blastoise.description: The pressurized water nozzles on its shell are used for high-speed tackles. The water can pierce steel.

caterpie.name: Caterpie
caterpie.description: If you touch the feeler on top of its head, it will release a horrible stench to protect itself.

metapod.name: Metapod
metapod.description: This Pokemon is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

butterfree.name: Butterfree
butterfree.description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

weedle.name: Weedle
weedle.description: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head.

kakuna.name: Kakuna
kakuna.description: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokemon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

beedrill.name: Beedrill
beedrill.description: Flies at high speed and attacks using the large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

pidgey.name: Pidgey
pidgey.description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

pidgeotto.name: Pidgeotto
pidgeotto.description: Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this Pokemon will fiercely peck any intruder.

pidgeot.name: Pidgeot
pidgeot.description: This Pokemon flies at Mach 2 speed, seeking prey. Its large talons are feared as weapons.

rattata.name: Rattata
rattata.description: Willing to chew on anything with its fangs. It can be found in many places. Extremely common.

raticate.name: Raticate
raticate.description: It uses its whiskers to maintain balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off.

spearow.name: Spearow
spearow.description: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

fearow.name: Fearow
fearow.description: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

ekans.name: Ekans
ekans.description: Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as Spearow, whole.

arbok.name: Arbok
arbok.description: The frightening patterns on its belly have been studied. Six variations have been confirmed.

pikachu.name: Pikachu
pikachu.description: When several of these Pokemon gather, their electricity can cause lightning storms.

raichu.name: Raichu
raichu.description: Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power.

sandshrew.name: Sandshrew
sandshrew.description: Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

sandslash.name: Sandslash
sandslash.description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

nidoran_f.name: Nidoran♀
nidoran_f.description: Although small, its venomous barbs render this Pokemon dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

nidorina.name: Nidorina
nidorina.description: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

nidoqueen.name: Nidoqueen
nidoqueen.description: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

nidoran_m.name: Nidoran♂
nidoran_m.description: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom.

nidorino.name: Nidorino
nidorino.description: An aggressive Pokemon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

nidoking.name: Nidoking
nidoking.description: It uses its powerful tail in battle to knock the enemy off its feet, then tramples the foe.

clefairy.name: Clefairy
clefairy.description: Thought to be the offspring of a fairy-like creature, this Pokemon is rarely seen and very lucky.

clefable.name: Clefable
clefable.description: A timid fairy Pokemon that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people.

vulpix.name: Vulpix
vulpix.description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older.

ninetales.name: Ninetales
ninetales.description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse.

jigglypuff.name: Jigglypuff
jigglypuff.description: When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep.

wigglytuff.name: Wigglytuff
wigglytuff.description: The body is soft and rubbery. When it inhales deeply, it can double or triple its size.

zubat.name: Zubat
zubat.description: Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets.

golbat.name: Golbat
golbat.description: Once it bites, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly.

oddish.name: Oddish
oddish.description: During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds.

gloom.name: Gloom
gloom.description: The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey.

vileplume.name: Vileplume
vileplume.description: The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up.

paras.name: Paras
paras.description: Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by drawing nutrients from the host bug.

parasect.name: Parasect
parasect.description: A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Mushroom spores.

venonat.name: Venonat
venonat.description: Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats bugs. It is attracted by light at night.

venomoth.name: Venomoth
venomoth.description: The dust-like scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has.

diglett.name: Diglett
diglett.description: Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground.

dugtrio.name: Dugtrio
dugtrio.description: A trio of Diglett that emerged from the ground. As a team, they are extremely powerful.

meowth.name: Meowth
meowth.description: Adores round objects. It wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

persian.name: Persian
persian.description: Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness.

psyduck.name: Psyduck
psyduck.description: While it is suffering from its headache, it sometimes uses mysterious powers. It can't remember doing so.

golduck.name: Golduck
golduck.description: Often seen swimming elegantly by lake shores. It is accomplished at swimming and diving.

mankey.name: Mankey
mankey.description: Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant.

primeape.name: Primeape
primeape.description: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught.

growlithe.name: Growlithe
growlithe.description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

arcanine.name: Arcanine
arcanine.description: A Pokemon that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings.

poliwag.name: Poliwag
poliwag.description: The direction of the spiral on the belly differs by area. The equator is thought to be the cause.

poliwhirl.name: Poliwhirl
poliwhirl.description: Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy.

poliwrath.name: Poliwrath
poliwrath.description: An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breaststroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers.

abra.name: Abra
abra.description: Sleeps 18 hours a day. If it senses danger, it teleports itself to safety even while asleep.

kadabra.name: Kadabra
kadabra.description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by.

alakazam.name: Alakazam
alakazam.description: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5000.

machop.name: Machop
machop.description: Loves to build its muscles. It trains in all styles of martial arts to become even stronger.

machoke.name: Machoke
machoke.description: Its muscular body is so powerful, it must wear a power-save belt to be able to regulate its motions.

machamp.name: Machamp
machamp.description: Using its amazing muscles, it throws powerful punches that can move faster than the eye can follow.

bellsprout.name: Bellsprout
bellsprout.description: A carnivorous Pokemon that traps and eats bugs. It uses its root feet to soak up needed moisture.

weepinbell.name: Weepinbell
weepinbell.description: It spits out poison powder to immobilize the enemy and then finishes it with a spray of acid.

victreebel.name: Victreebel
victreebel.description: Said to live in huge colonies deep in jungles, although no one has ever returned from there.

tentacool.name: Tentacool
tentacool.description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often caused substantial harm.

tentacruel.name: Tentacruel
tentacruel.description: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, they are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

geodude.name: Geodude
geodude.description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step on them or trip over them.

graveler.name: Graveler
graveler.description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

golem.name: Golem
golem.description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without being injured.

ponyta.name: Ponyta
ponyta.description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything completely flat in little time.

rapidash.name: Rapidash
rapidash.description: Very competitive, this Pokemon will chase anything that moves fast in the hopes of racing it.

slowpoke.name: Slowpoke
slowpoke.description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

slowbro.name: Slowbro
slowbro.description: The Shellder that is latched onto Slowpoke's tail is said to feed on the host's left over scraps.

magnemite.name: Magnemite
magnemite.description: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses THUNDER WAVE and similar moves.

magneton.name: Magneton
magneton.description: Formed by several Magnemites linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

farfetchd.name: Farfetch'd
farfetchd.description: The plant stalk it holds is its weapon and food. It walks about with a plant stalk in its bill.

doduo.name: Doduo
doduo.description: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

dodrio.name: Dodrio
dodrio.description: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.

seel.name: Seel
seel.description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. It is used for bashing through thick ice.

dewgong.name: Dewgong
dewgong.description: Loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of one fast asleep on a glacier was mistaken for a mermaid.

grimer.name: Grimer
grimer.description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

muk.name: Muk
muk.description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

shellder.name: Shellder
shellder.description: Its hard shell repels any attack. It is difficult to open when it snaps shut, but it is very delicious.

cloyster.name: Cloyster
cloyster.description: When attacked, it launches its horns in quick volleys. Its innards have never been seen.

gastly.name: Gastly
gastly.description: Almost invisible, this gaseous Pokemon cloaks the target and puts it to sleep without notice.

haunter.name: Haunter
haunter.description: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

gengar.name: Gengar
gengar.description: Under a full moon, this Pokemon likes to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

onix.name: Onix
onix.description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, but colored black.

drowzee.name: Drowzee
drowzee.description: Puts enemies to sleep then eats their dreams. Occasionally gets sick from eating bad dreams.

hypno.name: Hypno
hypno.description: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of unsettling moves that will cause fainting.

krabby.name: Krabby
krabby.description: Its pincers are not only powerful weapons, they are used for balance when walking sideways.

kingler.name: Kingler
kingler.description: The large pincer has 10000 hp of crushing power. However, it is so heavy, it is difficult to aim.

voltorb.name: Voltorb
voltorb.description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poke Ball, it has zapped many people.

electrode.name: Electrode
electrode.description: It stores electric energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

exeggcute.name: Exeggcute
exeggcute.description: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.

exeggutor.name: Exeggutor
exeggutor.description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute.

cubone.name: Cubone
cubone.description: Because it never removes its skull helmet, no one has ever seen this Pokemon's real face.

marowak.name: Marowak
marowak.description: The bone it holds is its key weapon. It throws the bone skillfully like a boomerang to KO targets.

hitmonlee.name: Hitmonlee
hitmonlee.description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra-long, loping strides.

hitmonchan.name: Hitmonchan
hitmonchan.description: While apparently doing nothing, it fires punches in lightning fast volleys that are impossible to see.

lickitung.name: Lickitung
lickitung.description: Its tongue can be extended like a chameleon's. It leaves a tingling sensation when it licks enemies.

koffing.name: Koffing
koffing.description: Because it stores several kinds of toxic gases in its body, it is prone to exploding without warning.

weezing.name: Weezing
weezing.description: Where two kinds of poison gases meet, 2 Koffing will fuse into a Weezing over many years.

rhyhorn.name: Rhyhorn
rhyhorn.description: Its brain is very small. It is so forgetful, it even forgets the reason it started charging.

rhydon.name: Rhydon
rhydon.description: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3,600 degrees.

chansey.name: Chansey
chansey.description: A rare and elusive Pokemon that is said to bring happiness to those who manage to get it.

tangela.name: Tangela
tangela.description: The whole body is swathed with wide vines that are similar to seaweed. Its vines shake as it walks.

kangaskhan.name: Kangaskhan
kangaskhan.description: The baby in its pouch is rarely out of its mother's care. However, the baby rarely obeys its parent.

horsea.name: Horsea
horsea.description: Known to shoot down flying bugs with precision blasts of ink from the surface of the water.

seadra.name: Seadra
seadra.description: Capable of swimming backwards by rapidly flapping its winglike pectoral fins and stout tail.

goldeen.name: Goldeen
goldeen.description: Its tail fin billows like an elegant ballgown. It has strong muscles. It can swim at 5 knots.

seaking.name: Seaking
seaking.description: In autumn, its body becomes more fatty in preparation for winter. It swims at a steady 8 knots.

staryu.name: Staryu
staryu.description: Even if its body is torn, it can regenerate as long as the glowing central core is unharmed.

starmie.name: Starmie
starmie.description: Its central core glows with the seven colors of the rainbow. Some people think it's a gem.

mr_mime.name: Mr. Mime
mr_mime.description: If you interrupt a Mr. Mime that is miming, it will slap you with its broad hands.

scyther.name: Scyther
scyther.description: With ninja-like agility and speed, it can create the illusion that there is more than one.

jynx.name: Jynx
jynx.description: It seductively wiggles its hips as it walks. It can cause people to dance in unison with it.

electabuzz.name: Electabuzz
electabuzz.description: Normally found near power plants, they can wander away and cause major blackouts in cities.

magmar.name: Magmar
magmar.description: Its body always burns with an orange glow that enables it to hide perfectly among flames.

pinsir.name: Pinsir
pinsir.description: If it fails to crush the victim in its pincers, it will bite, tear, and beat the victim with no mercy.

tauros.name: Tauros
tauros.description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its three tails.

magikarp.name: Magikarp
magikarp.description: In the distant past, it was somewhat stronger than the horribly weak descendants that exist today.

gyarados.name: Gyarados
gyarados.description: Once it begins to rampage, a Gyarados will burn everything down, even in a harsh storm.

lapras.name: Lapras
lapras.description: A Pokemon that has been overhunted almost to extinction. It can ferry people across the water.

ditto.name: Ditto
ditto.description: Capable of copying an enemy's genetic code to instantly transform itself into a duplicate of the enemy.

eevee.name: Eevee
eevee.description: A rare Pokemon that adapts to harsh environments by taking on different evolutionary forms.

vaporeon.name: Vaporeon
vaporeon.description: Capable of becoming invisible in water. It is said to have evolved when it was exposed to the moon.

jolteon.name: Jolteon
jolteon.description: It accumulates negative ions in the atmosphere to blast out 10000-volt lightning bolts.

flareon.name: Flareon
flareon.description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

porygon.name: Porygon
porygon.description: A Pokemon that consists entirely of programming code. Capable of moving freely in cyberspace.

omanyte.name: Omanyte
omanyte.description: Although an ancient Pokemon that was regenerated from a fossil, it is still relatively rare.

omastar.name: Omastar
omastar.description: A prehistoric Pokemon that died out because its heavy shell made it hard to catch prey.

kabuto.name: Kabuto
kabuto.description: A Pokemon that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

kabutops.name: Kabutops
kabutops.description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swimming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

aerodactyl.name: Aerodactyl
aerodactyl.description: A ferocious prehistoric Pokemon that goes for the enemy's throat with its serrated saw-like fangs.

snorlax.name: Snorlax
snorlax.description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

articuno.name: Articuno
articuno.description: A legendary bird Pokemon that can control ice. The flapping of its wings chills the air. As a result, it is said that when this Pokemon flies, snow will fall.

zapdos.name: Zapdos
zapdos.description: A legendary bird Pokemon that has the ability to control electricity. It usually lives in thunderclouds.

moltres.name: Moltres
moltres.description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

dratini.name: Dratini
dratini.description: Long considered a mythical Pokemon until recently when a small colony was found living underwater.

dragonair.name: Dragonair
dragonair.description: A mystical Pokemon that exudes a gentle aura. Has the ability to change climate conditions.

dragonite.name: Dragonite
dragonite.description: An extremely rarely seen marine Pokemon. Its intelligence is said to match that of humans.

mewtwo.name: Mewtwo
mewtwo.description: It was created by a scientist after years of horrific gene splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

mew.name: Mew
mew.description: So rare that it is still said to be a mirage by many experts. Only a few people have seen it worldwide.
